Off Calendar Sep-15-2017 Set For Trial On Aug-13-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Sy Nazif of the law offices of Marcereau and Nazif (949-531-6500) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Bryana S. McGuirk of the law offices of Kern Segal & Murray (415-474-1900) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT taken against defendant Shiva Gurung on July 19, 2017 is GRANTED. Desoto has shown that Mr. Gurung is entitled to have the default set aside per CCP 473.5. Granting this motion comports with California's strong policy of deciding cases on their merits and plaintiffs Zach Crowther and Dana Lee have not shown that they would suffer any legal prejudice by the granting of the motion. Both sides' requests for monetary awards are denied. Because Desoto misled plaintiffs about Mr. Gurung's address, it would be inequitable to make any award in Desoto's favor. Because plaintiffs' counsel should have notified Desoto's counsel prior to seeking entry of Mr. Gurung's default, it would be inequitable to make any award in plaintiffs' favor. Mr. Gurung has until November 30, 2017 to respond to the complaint. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR No. 6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org. (L&M302)
